name: no-unified-layout
description: PlatformFeaturesPage and AIChatDemoPage are completely separate pages with no integration. PlatformFeaturesPage fetches via mcpService.callTool directly. AIChatDemoPage uses useDomains().chat for MST store access. No shared session context between them.
recommendation: Create new FeatureControlPlanePage that combines: (1) FeatureSession selector from PlatformFeaturesPage, (2) Chat panel from AIChatDemoPage, (3) Entity data panel, (4) Skill cycle stepper.
